evals.name: happy-path-migration-plan
evals.prompt: Plan a cloud migration for our 50 on-premises applications to AWS
evals.expected_output: Comprehensive migration plan with 7R classification, wave planning, landing zone design, and cutover strategy
expectations: Defines cutover rehearsal checklist and rollback criteria

evals.name: edge-case-datacenter-exit-deadline
evals.prompt: We have 3 months to exit our datacenter. How do we migrate everything?
evals.expected_output: Recommends rehost-first strategy prioritized by lease expiry with post-migration optimization
expectations: Favors rehost for speed under deadline

evals.name: happy-path-7r-assessment
evals.prompt: Assess our ERP, CRM, and legacy billing system using the 7R framework
evals.expected_output: Per-application 7R classification with rationale, effort estimate, and risk level
expectations: Each application gets a specific 7R classification

evals.name: false-positive-new-cloud-app
evals.prompt: Design a new microservices application to run on Kubernetes
evals.expected_output: This skill should NOT be triggered; new cloud-native design uses cloud-native-architecture skill
expectations: Skill is not invoked for greenfield cloud-native design

evals.name: edge-case-shared-database
evals.prompt: We need to migrate an application but it shares a database with 4 other systems
evals.expected_output: Addresses shared database migration with options: migrate all consumers together, introduce API layer, or replicate and gradually cut over
expectations: Identifies shared database as migration constraint
Groups tightly coupled applications into same wave
